tools.name: extract_links

tools.description: Extract plain text content from HTML, stripping all tags.

tools.description: Validate HTML for common issues (unclosed tags, missing attributes, etc.).

tools.name: find_meta_tags
tools.description: Extract all meta tags and their attributes from HTML.
